title: Acronym
instructions: Convert a phrase to its acronym. An acronym is formed by taking the first letter of each word and converting it to uppercase. For example, 'Portable Network Graphics' becomes 'PNG'.

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: You can iterate through each character in the phrase

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Track whether the previous character was a space or hyphen

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use concatenate() to build up the result string

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use toUpperCase() to convert the final result to uppercase
